rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §253.037, which governs political contribution restrictions on general-purpose committees.
quote: A general-purpose committee may not knowingly make a political contribution to another general-purpose committee unless the other committee is listed in the campaign treasurer appointment of the contributor committee.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns campaign finance restrictions unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
